details.test: Task 1: Pay water bill between $50 and $100 as guest using credit card
Task 2: Register child for Saturday morning youth swim class under $80
Task 3: Submit pothole repair request at intersection
Task 4: Save previous-month City Council zoning meeting to favorites
Task 5: Save most recent road closure article from last 30 days to reading list
Task 6: Create trip plan for park with playground and restrooms open until at least 7:00 PM
Task 7: Start Residential Parking Permit application for Zone B beginning next month
Task 8: Submit bulk trash pickup request for three furniture items on earliest available Saturday >= 7 days away
Task 9: Subscribe to emergency alerts and arts & events email updates
